RelicActionFigure.name: Action Figure
RelicActionFigure.ability1: Give [[Coconut|food:coconut]] {PerkIcon} perk to two first enemies.
RelicActionFigure.ability2: Give [[Coconut|food:coconut]] {PerkIcon} to enemies front-to-back for every second shop tier.
RelicActionFigure.ability3: Give [[Coconut|food:coconut]] {PerkIcon} to enemies front-to-back for every second shop tier.

RelicBalloon.name: Balloon
RelicBalloon.ability1: Give the front-most friend +1 {AttackIcon} attack and +1 {HealthIcon} health.
RelicBalloon.ability2: Give the two front-most friends +1 {AttackIcon} attack and +1 {HealthIcon} health.
RelicBalloon.ability3: Give the three front-most friends +1 {AttackIcon} attack and +1 {HealthIcon} health.

RelicBoot.name: Boot
RelicBoot.ability1: Deal 50 {DamageIcon} damage to the front-most friend.
RelicBoot.ability2: Deal 8 {DamageIcon} damage to the back-most friend.
RelicBoot.ability3: Deal 8 {DamageIcon} damage to the back-most friend.

RelicBowlingBall.name: Bowling Ball
RelicBowlingBall.ability1: If you rolled less than 6 times this turn, deal the turn number as {DamageIcon} damage to friends.
RelicBowlingBall.ability2: Deal 3 {DamageIcon} damage to the friend behind.
RelicBowlingBall.ability3: Deal 3 {DamageIcon} damage to the friend behind.

RelicCardDeck.name: Deck of Cards
RelicCardDeck.ability1: Transform it into ANY random pet from the same tier with new base stats.

RelicChocolateBox.name: Chocolate Box
RelicChocolateBox.ability1: Give +1 {ExpIcon} experience to friends and +2 {ExpIcon} experience to enemies.

RelicCrumpledPaper.name: Crumpled Paper
RelicCrumpledPaper.ability1: Replace this with another random toy.

RelicFlute.name: Flute
RelicFlute.ability1: If you did not buy any tier 1 food this turn, make friends Dazed {DeafIcon} until next turn.

RelicFootball.name: Soccer Ball
RelicFootball.ability1: Knock out friends from the current tier.

RelicHandheldVacuumCleaner.name: Vacuum Cleaner
RelicHandheldVacuumCleaner.ability1: Remove the lowest tier perks from two friends.

RelicHandkerchief.name: Handkerchief
RelicHandkerchief.ability1: Make the two front-most friends Weak {WeakIcon}.
RelicHandkerchief.ability2: Make friends front-to-back Weak {WeakIcon} for each shop tier.
RelicHandkerchief.ability3: Make friends front-to-back Weak {WeakIcon} for each shop tier.

RelicKite.name: Kite
RelicKite.ability1: Remove 20% {AttackIcon} attack from the back-most friend and move it to the front.

RelicLamp.name: Lamp
RelicLamp.ability1: Remove 20% {AttackIcon} attack and 20% {HealthIcon} health from friends.
RelicLamp.ability2: Give the highest tier friend +8 {AttackIcon} attack and +8 {HealthIcon} health.
RelicLamp.ability3: Give the highest tier friend +12 {AttackIcon} attack and +12 {HealthIcon} health.

RelicLunchbox.name: Lunchbox
RelicLunchbox.ability1: Feed [[Apple|food:apple]] to random pets for each turn number. Double their power on enemies.

RelicMagicWand.name: Magic Wand
RelicMagicWand.ability1: Give the back-most tier 2 or lower friend +1 {ExpIcon} experience.
RelicMagicWand.ability2: Give the back-most tier 2 or lower friend +2 {ExpIcon} experience.
RelicMagicWand.ability3: Give the back-most tier 2 or lower friend +3 {ExpIcon} experience.

RelicPen.name: Pen
RelicPen.ability1: Make the two front-most friends Inked {InkIcon}.
RelicPen.ability2: Make friends front-to-back Inked {InkIcon} for each shop tier.
RelicPen.ability3: Make friends front-to-back Inked {InkIcon} for each shop tier.

RelicPillBottle.name: Pill Bottle
RelicPillBottle.ability1: Knock out the two front-most friends and the front-most enemy.

RelicPogoStick.name: Pogo Stick
RelicPogoStick.ability1: Push the last enemy up front and give it +100% {AttackIcon} attack and +100% {HealthIcon} health.
RelicPogoStick.ability2: Multiply attack {AttackIcon} and health {HealthIcon} of the lowest health enemy by 4.
RelicPogoStick.ability3: Multiply attack {AttackIcon} and health {HealthIcon} of the lowest health enemy by 4.

RelicRingPyramid.name: Ring Pyramid
RelicRingPyramid.ability1: Knock out friends from the previous tier.

RelicRockBag.name: Rock Bag
RelicRockBag.ability1: Deal 1 {DamageIcon} damage to the three front-most friends. Multiply damage with their tiers.
RelicRockBag.ability2: Deal 2 {DamageIcon} damage to a random friend for each turn.
RelicRockBag.ability3: Deal 2 {DamageIcon} damage to a random friend for each turn.

RelicScale.name: Scale
RelicScale.ability1: Set {AttackIcon} attack and {HealthIcon} health of all friends to the turn number.

RelicStickyHand.name: Sticky Hand
RelicStickyHand.ability1: Make the two back-most friends Icky {AcidIcon}.

RelicTeddyBear.name: Stuffed Bear

RelicTheOneRing.name: Ring

RelicWitchBroom.name: Witch Broom

RelicWitchBroom.ability2: Make two random perk-less enemies Weak {WeakIcon}.
RelicWitchBroom.ability3: Make three random perk-less enemies Weak {WeakIcon}.

RelicMicrowaver.ability3: Give [[Popcorn|food:popcorn]] {PerkIcon} perk to the three front-most perkless friends.

RelicCandelabra.ability3: Break and give all friends permanent +3 {AttackIcon} attack and +3 {HealthIcon} health.

RelicEvilBook.ability3: Summon one 18/18 Great One in battle that deals 15 {DamageIcon} damage to ALL other pets.

RelicSlinky.name: Spring

RelicSmartphone.name: Smartphone

RelicToyBoat.name: Toy Boat
